subject: A small robed figure stands in a blasted dark landscape as enormous twisting black tendrils erupt from the ground and snake upward into the sky
description: A lone robed figure, dwarfed by the scale of the threat, stands in a desolate scorched landscape while colossal serpentine tendrils of black energy or thorned vines erupt from the earth and twist violently upward into a sickly purple-grey sky. The tendrils branch and writhe like a malignant root system pulled inside-out. Faint sickly pink and violet glow rims the figure and the bases of the tendrils, suggesting necrotic magic or corrupted life force. The composition is bottom-heavy with the figure as a tiny silhouette beneath an oppressive canopy of hostile growth. Mood is grim, oppressive, and overwhelming.
foreground: robed figure with staff or hood, scorched ground, base of writhing black tendrils
background: twisting black tendrils against a sickly purple-grey sky, distant horizon line
emotion: isolation, dread, the scale of an unstoppable force bearing down on a small witness
